title: karpatiosorbus kmetiana
intro: Karpatiosorbus kmetiana, also known as the Kmetiana mountain ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is a shrub or small tree native to the Balkan Peninsula, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues. The plant's leaves and bark contain tannins, flavonoids, and other compounds that provide anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating digestive problems. Karpatiosorbus kmetiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional folk medicine.
